paths.summary: This path uses a combination of high-scoring APIs to fetch stock prices, store data, analyze trends, and send emails.

steps.action: Fetch real-time stock prices using Bing Keyword Planner URL Seed API
steps.why: This API has the highest score (0.9) and is suitable for fetching real-time data.

steps.action: Store and manage stock data using PrivatePublicAPI CreateUser API
steps.why: This API has a good score (0.1) and can be used to manage data storage.

steps.action: Analyze stock trends using Keyword Suggestion API Comparisons
steps.why: This API has a high score (0.8) and is suitable for trend analysis.

steps.action: Generate buy/sell signals based on analysis results using Keyword Suggestion API Questions
steps.why: This API has a good score (0.7) and can be used to generate signals.

steps.action: Send buy/sell signals to users via TicketPocket Send Link Coupon API
steps.why: This API has a good score (0.1) and can be used to send emails.

subtask_coverage.description: Fetch real-time stock prices using a stock market API
Store and manage stock data in a database
Analyze stock trends using a machine learning API
Generate buy/sell signals based on analysis results
Send buy/sell signals to users via an email API

overall_rationale: These paths are reasonable ways to satisfy the user goal of building a tool that tracks stock prices, analyzes trends using ML, and emails buy/sell signals to users. The paths differ in their combination of APIs, focusing on high scores, high QoS, and simplicity. Each path covers all subtasks fully, ensuring a comprehensive solution.
